vulnerability.title: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive
vulnerability.description: Check that Chrony only has time sources configured with the server directive.
vulnerability.recommendation: Review and remediate: Ensure Chrony is only configured with the server directive

triage_decision.reason: The finding involves standardizing the configuration of the Chrony NTP client by ensuring it uses the 'server' directive. This is a common hardening practice for time synchronization and does not impact system access, networking connectivity, or filesystem integrity.
triage_decision.estimated_impact: Incorrect NTP configuration could lead to time drift if the new server directive points to an unreachable source
